expectations.text: Correctly identifies the organization as IG2
expectations.evidence: States "Overall Compliance Estimate: ~15–20% of IG2 safeguards"

expectations.text: Identifies MFA on VPN as a critical gap with safeguard ID 6.4
expectations.evidence: Lists "No MFA on VPN — violates CIS Control 6, Safeguards 6.3 and 6.4"

expectations.text: Identifies missing vulnerability scanner as a critical gap (safeguards 7.5/7.6)
expectations.evidence: Lists "No vulnerability scanner — violates CIS Control 7, Safeguards 7.6 and 7.7"

expectations.text: Identifies centralized log management gap (safeguard 8.9) as critical
expectations.evidence: Lists "No centralized log management — violates CIS Control 8, Safeguards 8.3, 8.5, 8.11"

expectations.text: Provides structured gap table covering multiple CIS Controls with priority ratings
expectations.evidence: Includes full gap table with per-control RAG rating and 15-item remediation roadmap
